basic_details.job_title: NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist Posts
basic_details.short_information: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of National AYUSH Mission Kerala. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the NAM Kerala Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Certificate in Ayurveda Pharmacist Course recognize
qualification.details: Ayurveda Pharmacist: Diploma/Certificate in Ayurveda Pharmacist Course recognized by the Government of Kerala. Ayurveda Therapist (Male & Female): Ayurveda Therapist course by Govt. of Kerala (DAME approved) or one-year course from NARIP Cheruthuruthy.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist posts will be held on 26th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Ayurveda Pharmacist (2 posts) and Ayurveda Therapist (2 posts) under the National AYUSH Mission Kerala recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Ayurveda Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: For the Ayurveda Pharmacist post, candidates must possess a Diploma/Certificate in Ayurveda Pharmacist Course recognized by the Government of Kerala.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 40 years as of the notification date. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 14700 per month for both Ayurveda Pharmacist and Ayurveda Therapist positions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Certificate Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to be prepared for both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates if any, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673005. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis. The duration of the contract is not explicitly mentioned in the provided data, so candidates should refer to the official notification for details.
